_comment: Allowlist of npm packages that are permitted to run lifecycle scripts (preinstall/postinstall/install) during `npm ci`. The CI guard at scripts/ops/check-npm-install-scripts.mjs scans package-lock.json for `hasInstallScript: true` deps and fails if any are not in this allowlist. Rationale: lifecycle scripts are the primary supply-chain attack vector (e.g., Mini Shai-Hulud Sep 2026). A compromised transitive dep that ships a malicious postinstall is shut out by this guard until a human explicitly accepts the new dep here. See docs/SECRETS_MIGRATION.md#npm-install-script-policy for the review procedure when adding a new entry.
_format_note: Each entry is keyed by the lockfile package path (e.g., 'node_modules/sharp'). The `name` field is the package name. `reason` is a short justification for why this dep needs its install scripts (native bindings, binary download, etc). `added_at` is the date the dep was first allowlisted, for audit trail. The optional `version` field pins the entry to a specific version — when present, the guard fails on version drift (forcing a fresh review on each bump). When absent, any future version is accepted (more permissive, only use for deps you trust unconditionally).

allowed.name: esbuild
allowed.reason: Astro's bundled esbuild — downloads platform-specific Go binary at install. Used by marketing/site Astro build.

allowed.name: esbuild
allowed.reason: Top-level esbuild — downloads platform-specific Go binary at install. Used by various build tooling and indexer.

allowed.name: fsevents
allowed.reason: macOS-only file watcher. Optional dep of chokidar/Vite/etc. Install script is a no-op on Linux CI; included for parity. Does NOT execute network/exec code.

allowed.name: sqlite3
allowed.reason: Native SQLite bindings via node-gyp. Used by indexer/Ponder for local state. Install compiles the C bindings or downloads precompiled per node-pre-gyp.

allowed.name: unrs-resolver
allowed.reason: Native Rust-based module resolver used by some bundler tooling. Install downloads platform-specific binary.

allowed.name: sharp
allowed.reason: Native libvips bindings for image processing. Used by marketing/Astro site build for image optimization. Install downloads precompiled libvips for the runner arch.

allowed.name: sqlite3
allowed.reason: Nested sqlite3 under chopsticks-db (Acala fork-testing toolkit). Same package + install behavior as the top-level node_modules/sqlite3 entry — native SQLite bindings via node-gyp. Exposed as a separate path after the Tier 1 security-bumps lockfile regen.

allowed.name: esbuild
allowed.reason: Nested esbuild under ponder (indexer framework). Same install behavior as the top-level esbuild entry — downloads platform-specific Go binary. Exposed as a separate path after the Tier 1 lockfile regen because ponder pins a different version than the hoisted one.

allowed.name: esbuild
allowed.reason: Nested esbuild under vite-node (used by vitest). Same install behavior as the top-level esbuild entry. Exposed as a separate path after the Tier 1 lockfile regen.

allowed.name: esbuild
allowed.reason: Nested esbuild under vite (dev server / app build). Same install behavior as the top-level esbuild entry. Exposed as a separate path after the Tier 1 lockfile regen.
